calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-111 novelty drive: RNG desync between arms (supersedes 141c)
items.note: 141c C0 sanity check fired correctly: per_seed_action_divergence=[0,0,0] arms bit-identical despite novelty_bonus_weight=100, one-hot nav_bias, raised nav_bias=0.5. Root cause: random.seed(seed) at start of _run_single resets identical RNG stream in both arms; nav_bias decisions and override actions desync only via paired-RNG. 141d: random.seed(seed if novelty_enabled else seed+7777). Env still _make_env(seed) so paired comparison preserved at env level. Smoke confirms divergence=0.53 (vs 141c's 0.0).

items.title: SD-029/MECH-256 single-pass: drop interventional margin loss + add stdout fallback
items.note: 537c hidden_dim 128->256 lift didn't recover R^2 ceiling (p2_grad=False all seeds, fwd_r2 0.66-0.68). Width is not the bottleneck. 537d drops USE_INTERVENTIONAL to test whether the SD-013 margin loss (30% of batches) is fighting raw MSE fit and capping training R^2. EXQ-195 reached 0.914 baseline without interventional; the gap may be the loss term, not substrate complexity. Keeps hidden_dim=256, decoupled curricula, emit_outcome hook. Adds [experiment_type] outcome= stdout fallback line so the runner-side stdout-regex fallback classifies correctly even if REE_QUEUE_ID env var doesn't propagate (separate runner-side bug; 537c silent UNKNOWN root cause).
